title: My town
explanation:
My town

Read the text.

I live in a small town near the sea. There is a library, a supermarket and two cafés. There isn't a cinema, but there is a beautiful park. Many tourists visit in summer. The people are friendly and life is quiet. I like living here.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: There is a beautiful ____. | *park | cinema | sea
There is a ____ and a supermarket. | *library | park | tourist

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: You can buy food at the [*supermarket|library|park].
